prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东大学在上海市综合类最低位次分别为约5028名、5198名、5270名、6285名、6602名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1332名，2025年基准约6602名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年28人、2025年29人；2026年计划27人，较2025年减少2人（缩招约6.9%），缩招使竞争略有加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第22名（2021–2026年稳定在21–22名），属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（1个事件，主要涉及2019年学伴项目遗留舆情），但影响有限；抖音热度总排名第20位，评价为高热，短视频平台关注度高；2022–2025年声誉偏负面，曾出现陕西断档、新闻传播学类位次大幅下滑等信号，但上海市近年未出现明显断档；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达19个，其中数学A+为王牌学科，中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A等实力突出，与招生专业中的数学类、中国语言文学类、经济学类、法学类等高度对应，综合学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，数学/统计类专业推荐，法学分化观望但仍有热度；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增加约35.4%），竞争显著加剧；山东大学位于山东省济南市，在上海市招生计划约27–32人，占比较小；上海考生对985高校的跨省报考意愿较强，山东大学作为传统强校在上海有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近3年累计后移约1332名）、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（29→27人，-6.9%）、上海市考生总数大幅增加（+35.4%）导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，在2025年基准6602名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约6529名，区间6029–7029名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（智能软件与芯片新工科实验班）
- 人工智能
- 数学类（含潘承洞基地班、数学拔尖2.0班）
- 电子信息类（通信电子与光电方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 密码科学与技术（潘承洞密码班）
- 经济学类（经世学堂新文科实验班）
- 法学类（含双学位班）
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学，含闻一多基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 考古学（含吴金鼎班，联合培养项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6529名，区间6029–7029名。建议位次在6000名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的计算机类、人工智能、数学类等王牌专业；位次在6000–6600名之间的考生以二档的经济学类、法学类、中国语言文学类为主攻方向；位次在6600–7000名之间的考生可将三档考古学作为保底选择。山东大学学科门类齐全、A类学科众多，各档专业均有较强的学科支撑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 5028, 5198, 5270, 6285, and 6602 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1332 in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 6602 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Shandong University in Shanghai's comprehensive category: 32 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a reduction of about 6.9%), which slightly intensifies competition and puts pressure on rankings to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 22nd in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (stable at 21-22 from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (1 incident, mainly related to the legacy of the 2019 study partner program), but the impact is limited; Douyin heat ranking is 20th overall, rated as high heat, with high attention on short video platforms; from 2022 to 2025, the reputation was slightly negative, with signals such as a gap in Shaanxi and a significant drop in the ranking of Journalism and Communication, but no obvious gap has appeared in Shanghai in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines rated A- or above, among which Mathematics A+ is the flagship discipline, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Language and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc., are outstanding, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Mathematics, Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, Law, etc., with strong comprehensive discipline strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social heat, Mathematics/Statistics majors are recommended, Law is divided and watched but still has heat; the total number of candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition; Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, with an enrollment plan of about 27-32 in Shanghai, accounting for a small proportion; Shanghai candidates have a strong willingness to apply for 985 universities across provinces, and Shandong University, as a traditional strong school, has a certain appeal in Shanghai.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 1332 in the last 3 years), the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (29 to 27, -6.9%), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Shanghai (+35.4%) leading to intensified competition, and the slightly negative but limited impact of the school's reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 6602, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 6529, with a range of 6029 to 7029.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Intelligent Software and Chip New Engineering Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Mathematics (Including Pan Chengdong Base Class, Mathematics Top 2.0 Class)
- Electronic Information (Communication Electronics and Optoelectronics Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Cryptography Science and Technology (Pan Chengdong Cryptography Class)
- Economics (Jingshi Academy New Liberal Arts Experimental Class)
- Law (Including Dual Degree Class)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Including Wen Yiduo Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Archaeology (Including Wu Jinding Class, Joint Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6529, range 6029-7029. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 6000 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Mathematics; candidates with rankings between 6000-6600 should target Tier 2 majors such as Economics, Law, and Chinese Language and Literature as their main direction; candidates with rankings between 6600-7000 can consider Tier 3 Archaeology as a safe choice. Shandong University has a wide range of disciplines and numerous A-class disciplines, with strong disciplinary support for each tier of majors.
